text: Tomorrow will be hard, and that's okay. Nerves mean you care about yourself, and that's not a bad thing. The people doing this procedure have done it many times before. You're in capable hands. It's normal to feel scared of the unknown, but scared doesn't mean something will go wrong. Let yourself feel whatever you're feeling tonight. Get some rest if you can. I'll be thinking of you. And when it's over, I'll be right there. You've handled hard things before. This is just one more, and you don't have to face it alone.
